message:
fix(deacon): remove ZFC-violating dead pane distinction from Go (gt-4k12)

Remove cognitive branching that distinguished dead pane vs zombie shell
in deacon Start(). Go was inspecting pane_dead, choosing recovery
strategies, and using a magic 500ms sleep — all ZFC violations.

The auto-respawn hook (SetAutoRespawnHook) already handles clean exits
at the tmux level. Go now uniformly kills and recreates for all
'session exists but agent dead' cases.

Removed: IsPaneDead, RespawnPaneDefault (only used for this logic),
and 3 dead-pane test cases.
